message:
fix(clippy): resolve all pedantic/nursery warnings in server crate (110 → 0)

Fixes across 15 TUI files plus main.rs:
- doc_markdown: backtick-wrap type names in doc comments
- missing_const_for_fn: add const to pure functions
- match_same_arms: combine identical match arms
- map_or_else: replace if-let with map_or_else/unwrap_or_else
- cast_*: targeted allow attrs for intentional numeric casts
- suboptimal_flops: use mul_add for fused multiply-add
- format_push_string: use write! instead of push_str(format!())
- uninlined_format_args: inline format arguments
- needless_borrow: remove unnecessary & on format!()
- redundant_clone: eliminate unnecessary .clone()/.to_vec()
- too_many_lines/too_many_arguments/struct_excessive_bools: allow attrs
- inclusive_range: use ..= instead of ..(N+1)

Also includes co-located TUI feature additions (ws-input parsing,
remote terminal events, agent status animations, message badges)
that were written clippy-clean by other agents on the same files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
